post_verify_modifications: RE-POINT existing `coldhands SERVES three-eyed-crow` -> target `brynden-rivers` (the three-eyed crow IS Bloodraven; the species node is a mis-target; preserve original evidence adwd-bran-01:73 'taking me to the three-eyed crow')
RE-POINT existing `coldhands SWORN_TO three-eyed-crow` -> target `brynden-rivers` (wiki:Coldhands; preserve provenance)
RETIRE existing `three-eyed-crow TEACHES bran-stark` (mis-pointed at the species node; superseded by the minted `brynden-rivers TUTORS bran-stark`)

RETIRE existing `three-eyed-crow HOLDS_TITLE lord` (mis-pointed; `brynden-rivers HOLDS_TITLE lord` already exists). Leaves the `three-eyed-crow` species node islanded -> flag for a future cross-identity pass (do NOT SAME_AS species<->character).

edges.quote: I dreamed that the sea was lapping all around Winterfell
edges.note: Jojen's 'sea comes to Winterfell' green dream; named drowned men (Alebelly, Septon Chayle, Mikken) all die in the ironborn sack. The salt sea = the ironborn. BRAN->WO5K/NORTH cross-container seam (marquee).

edges.quote: In the dark of night the salt sea will flow over these walls
edges.note: reader-facing Chekhov's-gun complement to GD1 (DREAMS_OF = character-facing). The warned deaths literally occur. fresh-verify: keep both edge types or collapse to DREAMS_OF only?

edges.quote: I dreamed of a winged wolf bound to earth with grey stone chains
edges.note: the winged-wolf-in-chains green dream; the crow (Bloodraven) pecking the chains = Bran freed into greensight. Fulfilled at the arc terminus.

edges.quote: The crow sent us here to break your chains
edges.note: Jojen interprets the dream as Bran's greenseer destiny. T2 (interpretive link to the terminus). fresh-verify: redundant with GD3?

edges.quote: he was skinning off your faces with a long red blade
edges.note: the 'Reek skinning your faces' dream -> the miller's-boys deception that produces the false news. T2 (interpretive: dream is partly subverted, the boys aren't Bran/Rickon, but Robb receives it as real). BRAN->WO5K seam.

edges.quote: I saw you and Rickon in your crypts
edges.note: a SECOND distinct green dream in the same conversation (Lens D F5) -> the crypt survival, literally fulfilled. Do NOT collapse with GD5.

edges.quote: Your blood makes you a greenseer
edges.note: lights the dead `greensight` concept node (0 edges). Bran becomes a greenseer after the paste.

edges.quote: The last greenseer, the singers called him
edges.note: Bloodraven IS the last greenseer (the singers' own name). Lights greensight.

edges.quote: It was a green dream, so I knew it was true
edges.note: greendreams = greensight (Luwin: 'Call it greensight'). T2 (text stops short of calling Jojen a greenseer). fresh-verify.

edges.quote: Never fear the darkness, Bran
edges.note: Bloodraven's sustained one-on-one greenseer mentorship in the cave (slip the skin, fly as a raven, read the trees). DISTINCT from the existing `jojen-reed TUTORS bran-stark`. Also the correct replacement for the retired `three-eyed-crow TEACHES bran-stark`.

edges.quote: Lord Brynden drew his life from the tree
edges.note: Bloodraven physically merged with / sustained by the weirwood roots (roots through his flesh; draws his life from the tree). T2 per weaker-type caution (mutual-bond implication). Target = `weirwood` species node.

edges.quote: those who sang the song of earth: Ash and Leaf
edges.note: Leaf is one of the children/singers. `leaf` had 0 incoming edges. Clean missing edge.

edges.quote: Most of him has gone into the tree
edges.note: Leaf is Bran's primary informant on the singers, the greenseers, Bloodraven's condition, the cave. TEACHES (casual instruction), distinct from Bloodraven's TUTORS (magic). T2 (one lens). fresh-verify.

edges.quote: The Reeds had to carry Bran up the last few steps
edges.note: Jojen has TRAVELS_WITH bran-stark; Meera (the Reeds) does NOT. She carries/escorts Bran the whole journey north of the Wall. Clean gap.

edges.quote: driving her frog spear deep into the wight
edges.note: Meera frog-spears the wight reaching for Bran during the cave-approach ambush. Distinct from her steady-state PROTECTS. fresh-verify the rescue-vs-protect line.

edges.quote: driving her frog spear deep into the wight
edges.note: Meera is currently only VICTIM_IN wight-ambush; she actively fights (frog-spear). Adds the agent role. Consistent once wight-ambush is SUB_BEAT_OF the cave arrival (SB1).

edges.quote: I will take Rickon with me
edges.note: after the split Osha is Rickon's sole escort. She has PROTECTS rickon-stark but not TRAVELS_WITH. Clean gap.

edges.quote: suddenly he was Hodor
edges.note: the combat warging at the cave approach (Bran forcibly seizes Hodor to fight the wights) — distinct, higher-stakes instance vs the existing asos-bran-03 weirwood-pool warg. fresh-verify: 2nd instance vs upgrade-existing-cite (the iconic Hodor-warging-in-combat beat).

edges.quote: call him what you will. The last greenseer
edges.note: Coldhands answers Meera's 'who is the three-eyed crow?' with 'the last greenseer' — the first in-world identification of the destination. fresh-verify (minor disclosure).

edges.quote: the name she gave me at her breast was Brynden
edges.note: Bloodraven reveals his true name to Meera (she asked) — the explicit identity revelation of the three-eyed crow. fresh-verify.

edges.quote: The Black Gate, he called it
edges.note: the weirwood Black Gate is embedded in the Nightfort's kitchen well. Object/place containment edge.

edges.quote: sat dreaming in a tangled nest of roots
edges.note: Bloodraven resides permanently in the cave, enthroned in the weirwood roots. Cave node EXISTS (locations/).

edges.quote: The singers made Bran a throne of his own
edges.note: Bran is installed in the cave (his own weirwood throne) — the arc's terminus residence.

edges.quote: All around him, wights were rising from beneath the snow
edges.note: de-islands the legacy `wight-ambush` (0 outgoing) — the obstacle beat WITHIN the cave-arrival event (same chapter/scene/participants). Does NOT re-mint the fight (cave node already has the AGENT_IN roster).
